items.title: California wildfires LIVE: Death toll surges as firefighters brace for more fierce winds
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
AP is live from Pasadena/Altadena as firefighters battle wind-whipped wildfires tearing across the area. Deaths in the fires that have ravaged neighborhoods in the past week rose, reaching 24 with an update in the official count late Sunday. Read more: https://bit.ly/3WjkEye

#wildfire #losangeles #california #usa #news #live

items.title: Hegseth could lead troops who would face getting fired for actions he's done in the past
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Some current and former defense leaders and veterans are questioning whether Pete Hegseth would be able to enforce discipline in the ranks if the Senate confirms him as President-elect Donald Trump's defense secretary. Read more: https://bit.ly/4agzD1A

#petehegseth #usa #news

items.title: What's the significance of Maha Kumbh, AP explains as India kicks off a massive Hindu festival
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Millions of Hindu devotees, mystics and holy men and women from all across India flocked to the northern city of Prayagraj on Monday to kickstart the Maha Kumbh festival, which is being touted as the world's largest religious gathering. Read more: https://bit.ly/3DT6gGq
(AP video shot by Shonal Ganguly and Rishi Lekhi)

#mahakumbh2025 #prayagraj #india #news

items.title: Indian PM Modi marks the opening of a strategic tunnel in disputed Kashmir
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The $932 million tunnel will grant all-year accessibility to a town that is isolated by heavy snow each winter. Experts say the project will boost capabilities for the military while offering more freedom of movement to civilians. Read more: https://bit.ly/4fWvrFi

items.title: Progress made in talks over Israel-Hamas ceasefire and hostage release, Israeli FM says
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Saar says  “progress was made” in ceasefire negotiations with Hamas. U.S. and Arab mediators made significant progress overnight toward a ceasefire and hostage release in the Israel-Hamas war, but no deal has been reached yet, officials said. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gU9dFw
(AP video: Shlomo Mor)

#israelhamaswar #usa #news

items.title: Tourists enjoy hot pots, ice sculptures and even frozen desserts as China's 'ice city' shivers at -2
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
In Harbin, China's "Ice City," winter temperatures have plunged to a biting -22°C, yet the city's frosty conditions only add to its allure as a winter wonderland. Tourists have flocked to experience its stunning ice sculptures, warm cuisine, and unique snow-filled adventures.

#harbin #icecity #china

Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Croatia’s president Milanović wins second five-year term in a landslide
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Croatia’s opposition-backed President Zoran Milanović, a critic of the European Union and NATO, overwhelmingly won reelection for another five-year term on Sunday, defeating a candidate from the ruling conservative party in a runoff vote. Read more: https://
(AP video shot by: Eldar Emric)

items.title: Dazzling Ice Castles draw tourists to annual architectural celebration of ice
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
An annual architectural celebration of ice is up and running again in New Hampshire and several other states. Ice Castles, which are both temporary art installations and tourist attractions, feature towers, tunnels, archways and caves, all created by growing, harvesting and arranging thousands of icicles and then blasting them with sprinklers. (AP video shot by Robert Bukaty) Read more here: https://bit.ly/3WeBzBX

#ice #usa #news

items.title: LA city Fire Chief Kristin Crowley warns 'wind event' is fast approaching
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Firefighters scrambled Sunday to make further progress against wildfires that have destroyed thousands of homes and killed 24 people in the Los Angeles area as forecasters again warned of dangerous weather with the return of strong winds this week. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4hbjGMf

items.title: LIVE: Supporters of impeached South Korean president rally outside his residence
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Supporters of impeached South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol rally outside his official residence in Seoul. Anti-corruption officials and police are planning another attempt to bring Yoon into custody as they investigate whether his martial law declaration on Dec. 3 amounted to an attempted rebellion.

#southkorea #yoonsukyeol #live

items.title: Maha Kumbh LIVE: Hindu festival in India touted as world's largest religious gathering
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Live from Prayagraj as millions of Hindu devotees gather in the north Indian state of Uttar Pradesh for the Maha Kumbh festival, said to be the largest religious congregation on earth.

Nearly 400 million people are expected to participate in the festival between Jan. 13 and Feb. 26 for a series of ritual baths at the confluence of the Ganges, the Yamuna and the mythical Saraswati rivers. Hindu faithful believe the holy dip will cleanse them of their past sins and end their process of reincarnation.

#india #kumbh #live
